title: Commercial Refrigeration
lede: Walk-in coolers and freezers, reach-ins, ice machines, refrigerated display cases, beverage equipment — service, repair, replacement, and 24/7 emergency response for the equipment that keeps your inventory from spoiling.
metaDescription: Commercial refrigeration service from STR Mechanical — walk-ins, reach-ins, ice machines, display cases across NC, VA, and SC. EPA-certified techs, 24/7 emergency response.
featuresHeading: From the ice machine to the walk-in cooler.
featuresLead: Restaurants, supermarkets, convenience stores, distribution centers — the Carolinas run on refrigeration. We service the full equipment list and keep parts on the trucks for the common failures.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 12h18M12 4v16"/></svg>
features.title: Walk-in coolers & freezers
features.body: Service, repair, and replacement — compressors, evaporators, condensers, defrost controls, door gaskets, and condensate management.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="5" y="3" width="14" height="18" rx="1"/><path d="M5 12h14M9 7v.01M9 16v.01"/></svg>
features.title: Reach-in & prep units
features.body: Reach-in coolers and freezers, sandwich and pizza prep tables, undercounter units — for the kitchen line, the bar, and the back-of-house.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M8 8h2v2H8zM14 8h2v2h-2zM8 14h2v2H8zM14 14h2v2h-2z"/></svg>
features.title: Ice machines
features.body: Hoshizaki, Manitowoc, Scotsman, Follett, Ice-O-Matic — diagnosis, cleaning, water-line and filter service, and full replacement when a rebuild stops making sense.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="6" width="20" height="12" rx="1"/><path d="M6 6v12M18 6v12M2 12h20"/></svg>
features.title: Refrigerated display cases
features.body: Open and closed-door grocery cases, deli and meat cases, beverage merchandisers — coil cleaning, refrigerant management, and door gasket replacement.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M3 10h18"/><rect x="3" y="6" width="18" height="15" rx="2"/></svg>
features.title: Refrigerant compliance
features.body: EPA Section 608 leak detection and repair, refrigerant recovery and tracking, and AIM Act / HFC phase-down planning so your equipment stays legal as the rules change.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 7h18M3 12h18M3 17h18"/></svg>
features.title: Rack systems & remote condensers
features.body: Supermarket and convenience-store rack systems, parallel compressor racks, remote condensing units — controls tuning, leak isolation, and end-of-life replacement planning.

whyHeading: When the cooler goes down, the clock is running.
whyParagraphs: Refrigeration failures are different from HVAC. A rooftop unit going out at 8 p.m. is uncomfortable; a walk-in going out at 8 p.m. is a four-figure inventory loss by morning. The math gets worse with every hour.

Our refrigeration techs run on a parts-stocked truck rotation tuned for the common failures: condenser fan motors, compressor contactors, defrost timers, expansion valves. Diagnose, repair, log, leave. One trip whenever the part is on the truck.
whyBullets: EPA Section 608 universal-certified techs on every refrigeration truck
Common compressors, condenser fan motors, and contactors stocked on trucks
Manufacturer-authorized service for Hoshizaki, Manitowoc, Scotsman ice machines
Refrigerant leak detection and HFC compliance handled
24/7 emergency response — restaurants and supermarkets are priority dispatch
ctaHeading: Let's keep your cold chain cold.
ctaParagraph: Whether you need a tech today or a quote on a new walk-in, give us a call. New equipment install, end-of-life replacements, and PM contracts all start with a site walk.
